zh.lifeSummary: 當Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis於1093年出生時，他的父親Philippe Ier roi des Francs41歲，母親Berthe de Montfort23歲。他於1115年與Elisabeth de Nangis結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1119年在法國諾門迪享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis于1093年出生时，他的父亲Philippe Ier roi des Francs41岁，母亲Berthe de Montfort23岁。他于1115年与Elisabeth de Nangis结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1119年在法国諾門迪享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Fleury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name meaning ‘flower’, occasionally used in the Middle Ages. Modern use, however, seems to derive mainly from the character of this name in  John Galsworthy's  The Forsyte Saga (  1922 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis was born in 1093, his father, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, was 41 and his mother, Berthe de Montfort, was 23. He married Elisabeth de Nangis in 1115. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1119, in Normandy, France, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis est né en 1093, son père, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Berthe de Montfort, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de Nangis en 1115. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1119, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis 1093 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe Ier roi des Francs 41 und seine Mutter Berthe de Montfort 23. Er hat 1115 Elisabeth de Nangis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1119 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Elisabeth de Nangis nel 1115. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1119, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangisが1093年に生まれた時，父Philippe Ier roi des Francsは41歳，母Berthe de Montfortは23歳であった。1115年にElisabeth de Nangisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1119年にフランスノーマンディで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis(이)가 1093년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe Ier roi des Francs(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthe de Montfort(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1115년 Elisabeth de Nangis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1119년 프랑스 노먼디에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fleury de France Seigneur of Nangis родился в 1093 г., его отцу по имени Philippe Ier roi des Francs было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Berthe de Montfort, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de Nangis в 1115 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1119 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 27 лет.
